channel.title: Debasis Bandyopadhyay on LMI
channel.description: Recent content in Debasis Bandyopadhyay on LMI

item.title: Synthesis, Crystal Structure, And Antibacterial Activity Of Mononuclearnickel(Ii) And Cobalt(Iii) Schiff-Base Complexes
Synthesis And Crystal Structure Of Two New Heteropolynuclear[(Nicdcdniii)-Cd-Ii-Cd-Ii-Ni-Ii] And [(Nicdniii)-Cd-Ii-Ni-Ii] Schiffbase Complexes Involving Bridging Chlorine And Oxygen Functions
Synthesis, Crystal Structure And Magnetic Characterization Of A Seriesof Four Phenoxo-Bridged Binuclear Manganese(Iii) Schiff Base Complexes
